Advertising and Sponsorship

This site currently does not enable advertising code and does not display fake ad placements. If Google AdSense or another advertising service is added later, advertising must remain clearly separate from story content, navigation, and source notes.

Advertising or sponsorship must not determine source labels, rights notes, or editorial judgment. Paid collaborations should be disclosed on the relevant page.

Midnight Archive

Public-domain tale guides, source checks, and original editorial notes. Every English page keeps a visible source and translation note.
